---
title: "Explore has moved"
page-layout: full
toc: false
search: false
---

::: {.content-block .mn-legacy-note}
<p class="mn-kicker">NEW HOME</p>

## Interactives now live with their projects

Keeping an interactive beside its question, explanations and updates makes it easier to understand how the pieces fit together.

[Visit the Kolam Tile Laboratory project](../projects/entries/kolam-tile-laboratory/index.qmd){.btn .btn-primary}
[Browse all projects](../projects/index.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-dark}
:::
